records.ety: [F., fr. L. hypocrita, Gr. <?/ one who plays a part on the stage, a dissembler, feigner. See Hypocrisy.]

defs: One who plays a part; especially, one who, for the purpose of winning approbation of favor, puts on a fair outside seeming; one who feigns to be other and better than he is; a false pretender to virtue or piety; one who simulates virtue or piety.
quotes: I dare swear he is no hypocrite, but prays from his heart.
